chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.195 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 13.12.2024 Mr. Fahim Raza, Advocate for the appellant. Mr. Obaid-ur-Rehman, Advocate for respondent No.1. M/s. Ammar Sooria & Talha Javed, Advocates for Respondent Nos.2 and 3..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. In view of the disposal of the connected Appeal No.193/2022, this appeal is also disposed of. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
